mapper.sql: id, name, gender, title, department_id, hospital_id, avatar, phone, intro, expertise, consult_count, rating, follow_count, online_status, price, registration_price, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_doctor order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_doctor set name = #{et.name}, gender = #{et.gender}, title = #{et.title}, department_id = #{et.departmentId}, hospital_id = #{et.hospitalId}, avatar = #{et.avatar}, phone = #{et.phone}, intro = #{et.intro}, expertise = #{et.expertise}, consult_count = #{et.consultCount}, rating = #{et.rating}, follow_count = #{et.followCount}, online_status = #{et.onlineStatus}, price = #{et.price}, registration_price = #{et.registrationPrice}, status = #{et.status}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
